stdout:
============================================================
14 Down is COVERAGE, and it was the clue we most wanted you to reach, because it is the one number your Monday forecast call cannot settle: three dashboards, three coverage figures, none of them trusted. What the grid holds back is the real one, your actual pipeline coverage ratio once those three systems are reconciled into a single figure. Glad the team had a go over lunch. Worth twenty minutes to work that number out together?
============================================================

Classification: gift language, question. Branch: gift bridge (craft to the tension the piece named).
